TestCase z15Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data1, t1.data1, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data1 = follow_case_data1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: need at least 2 elements to perform sorting meaningfully
    if (follow_case.n1 < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Sort data1 array in ascending order (simple selection sort)
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n1 - 1; ++i) {
        for (int j = i + 1; j < follow_case.n1; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.data1[i] > follow_case.data1[j]) {
                double temp = follow_case.data1[i];
                follow_case.data1[i] = follow_case.data1[j];
                follow_case.data1[j] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
